summary: Executed comprehensive Playwright UI tests on the Radha Madhav frontend-only site (desktop + mobile). All 30 assertions passed: 7 routes resolve, navigation/logo/marquee/whatsapp-float/bottom-nav/sticky-visit render, hero CTA navigates to /collections, collections filters render products, stylist tool builds a correct WA link with user selections, Membership & Contact forms open correct wa.me URLs with encoded payloads and Membership shows 'Welcome to the Parivaar' success state, Gallery lightbox opens and closes on outside click, festive popup appears after ~5.5s and closes via X, mobile hamburger drawer opens and shows all 7 nav items, map iframe renders, logo asset loads. WhatsApp deep links all contain wa.me/919151687774.

issues: Screenshot shows drawer header overlaps the top marquee strip — logo in drawer sits beneath the faint marquee bar; consider adding a top offset equal to the marquee height for visual polish (non-blocking).

critical_code_review_comments: Gallery.jsx lightbox close button has no onClick handler (the parent div's onClick={() => setOpen(null)} closes it via event bubbling, which works, but the explicit button click will also close through bubbling — fine, just noting it).
Home.jsx hero <video> has no muted audio fallback alt visual if the video file 404s; poster='/assets/images/showroom.jpg' is used which mitigates this — verify asset exists.
Layout.jsx festive popup uses sessionStorage — after first dismiss in a session the popup never re-appears (intentional). Tested OK.
Collections.jsx stylist WA link builds even when Gender/Occasion/Budget are empty (defaults to '—'); acceptable UX but consider disabling the button until at least one field is filled.
No data-testid on the desktop nav individual <NavLink> items beyond `nav-<label>`; OK — present and used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only React site. Public URL is REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. WhatsApp forms are tested by stubbing window.open and asserting the captured URL contains wa.me/919151687774 plus encoded payload. Festive popup fires 5.5s after load; clear sessionStorage key 'rm_popup_dismissed' and reload to retest. No backend exists.
